mood: Cinematic, inviting, effortless travel. Like flipping through a premium travel magazine. Grounded, yet luxurious.

rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-semibold text-[#1C1917]

layout_spacing.grid: Use bento grid 'Tetris' logic for marketing landing page sections. For the AI planner dashboard, use a 'Control Room' grid (Map on the left, pinned editable itinerary timeline rail on the right).
layout_spacing.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-16 for containers. CRITICAL: Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).
layout_spacing.surfaces: Use 'Glassmorphism (Crystal)' with backdrop-blur-xl and bg-white/70 for sticky headers and AI floating panels. Use solid 'Neumorphism' with sharp 1px borders for dashboard cards.
layout_spacing.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-align dense content. Do not center everything.

motion_interaction.hover: Hover states must explicitly set text color. Subtle -translate-y-1 on feature cards.
motion_interaction.transitions: Use specific properties (e.g., transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease). Do not use transition-all.
motion_interaction.marquee: Use Option A 'Editorial Ribbon' for destinations or partners scrolling. Slow organic drift with wide gaps.

components.marketing: Pure HTML + Tailwind CSS. Raw divs for overlapping and asymmetry. Heavy use of high-quality images.
components.dashboard_and_forms: Shadcn components heavily customized. Go cardless or use flat, dense styles for data.
components.charts: Shadcn charts or Recharts for the interactive dashboard cost breakdown.

testing.requirement: CRITICAL: All interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, tabs) MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='book-now-button').

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react for standard icons. For the EYV logo, do not use a raster image. Instead, create a premium animated logo using the lucide 'Globe' and 'Plane' icons with an SVG trail effect.

images.description: Aerial view of a luxury tropical beach resort.
Person standing on a cliff during golden hour.
Warm interior of a local authentic restaurant.
Luxury hotel room interior with a white bed and wooden headboard.
Solitary figure on a sandy beach.

media.logos: NO PLACEHOLDER URLs ALLOWED for any logos. Build the EYV logo using code/SVG.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the hero image has a subtle gradient overlay (e.g., bg-gradient-to-r from-black/50 to-transparent) to preserve visibility while keeping text readable. Max opacity 50%.
Implement the AI Planner Interface as a multi-step floating glass panel over a contextual map or background.
For the vacation dashboard, use a Map-First + Itinerary Right-Rail Split View layout.
NEVER use Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans for headings. Use Cormorant Garamond for headings and Outfit for body text.
Ensure all buttons and links have distinct hover states with contrast.
Do not use generic shadcn cards for marketing; build bento grids. Use customized shadcn for the dashboard components.
Remember to include data-testid on all interactive elements as requested.
